Water beading up instead of soaking in

tool_block.heading: Enter your postcode. Find what's actually wrong.
tool_block.body: Your water hardness, indoor humidity, and the most common cause for your symptom in your area — in 90 seconds.
tool_block.cta_alt: No postcode? Start with the symptom →

articles.title: The porosity test is broken — here's what actually matters
articles.dek: The float test measures surface damage, not absorption. UK chemists say skip it.

articles.title: How to read your hair porosity: the full guide
articles.dek: What low, medium, and high porosity mean for natural and Afro hair.

articles.title: Why your products stopped working in autumn
articles.dek: UK indoor heating drops humidity to 30–40%. Your glycerin-heavy products are working against you.

cards.title: We buy what we test
cards.body: No brand pays us. Products are tested for eight weeks in London hard water before any verdict.

cards.title: Verdicts are decided first
cards.body: The editor sees no commission rates before the recommendation. We'll tell you to skip products we link to.

cards.title: We say what we don't know
cards.body: Every claim is confidence-graded. When the evidence is thin, we say so.
